headline: Hershey (HSY) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why
summary: Hershey (HSY) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

headline: Campbell's Q2 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Sales Down 5% Y/Y
summary: CPB misses Q2 estimates as EPS drops 31% and sales fall 5% year over year, hurt by weak snacks demand and cost inflation.

headline: Defense Lifts Moat Stocks As Tech Stumbles
summary: Moat Index gained 2.13% in February, outperforming the S&P 500 by nearly 3 percentage points as defensive rotation favored its equal-weighted, valuation-conscious approach.
